transcription.text: how come you drive a volkswagen rabbit well i drove volkswagens for years and frankly i wasn't too sure about the rabbit really really so i checked it out real good and now they've done it again best volkswagen i've ever owned would you buy another rabbit why should i i owned my last volkswagen for seven years
